svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" modified="2024-03-07T00:00:00.000Z" agent="Mozilla/5.0" etag="xyz" version="22.1.2" type="device"> <diagram id="stack-design-detailed" name="Detailed Stack Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1400" dy="1200" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <!-- Environment Boundary --> <mxCell id="env_box" value="Full System Architecture Details" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8f9fa;strokeColor=#ced4da;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;spacingTop=20;fontColor=#495057;arcSize=2;shadow=0;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=22;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="80" width="960" height="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- ================= FRONTEND LAYER ================= --> <mxCell id="frontend_layer" value="Frontend Application (Client Side)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff3e0;strokeColor=#fb8c00;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;spacingTop=20;fontColor=#e65100;arcSize=4;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=18;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="140" width="880" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fe_ui" value="UI Components<br><span style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: normal;">React / Tailwind CSS</span>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#fb8c00;fontColor=#e65100;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="200" width="160" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fe_state" value="Application State<br><span style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: normal;">Context API / Redux</span>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#fb8c00;fontColor=#e65100;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="400" y="200" width="160" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fe_api" value="API Client / Fetch<br><span style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: normal;">Axios / React Query</span>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#fb8c00;fontColor=#e65100;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="840" y="200" width="160" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- Connections within Frontend --> <mxCell id="edge_fe1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#fb8c00;strokeWidth=2;" edge="1" parent="1" source="fe_ui" target="fe_state"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_fe2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#fb8c00;strokeWidth=2;" edge="1" parent="1" source="fe_state" target="fe_api"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- ================= BACKEND LAYER ================= --> <mxCell id="backend_layer" value="Backend API Server (Server Side)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e8f5e9;strokeColor=#43a047;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;spacingTop=20;fontColor=#2e7d32;arcSize=4;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=18;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="340" width="880" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="be_router" value="Router &amp; Auth API<br><span style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: normal;">Express / JWT Guard</span>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#43a047;fontColor=#2e7d32;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="840" y="400" width="160" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="be_services" value="Business Logic<br><span style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: normal;">Controllers &amp; Services</span>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#43a047;fontColor=#2e7d32;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="640" y="400" width="160" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="be_orm" value="Data Access / ORM<br><span style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: normal;">Prisma / Mongoose</span>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#43a047;fontColor=#2e7d32;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;arcSize=10;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="400" width="160" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- Connections within Backend --> <mxCell id="edge_be1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#43a047;strokeWidth=2;" edge="1" parent="1" source="be_router" target="be_services"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_be2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#43a047;strokeWidth=2;" edge="1" parent="1" source="be_services" target="be_orm"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- ================= DATABASE LAYER ================= --> <mxCell id="database_layer" value="Persistence Layer" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e3f2fd;strokeColor=#1e88e5;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;spacingTop=20;fontColor=#1565c0;arcSize=4;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=18;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="540" width="880" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db_primary" value="Primary Database<br><span style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: normal;">PostgreSQL / MongoDB</span>" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#1e88e5;fontColor=#1565c0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="580" width="160" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db_cache" value="Cache Layer<br><span style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: normal;">Redis (Optional)</span>" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#1e88e5;fontColor=#1565c0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="400" y="580" width="160" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db_storage" value="Object Storage<br><span style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: normal;">AWS S3 / GridFS</span>" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#1e88e5;fontColor=#1565c0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="640" y="580" width="160" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- Connections within DB --> <mxCell id="edge_db1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#1e88e5;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="db_cache" target="db_primary"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- ================= CROSS LAYER EDGES ================= --> <!-- API Connection --> <mxCell id="edge_fe_be" value="REST / GraphQL HTTP Requests (JSON)<br><span style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: normal;">[Secure HTTPS with JWT Token in Header]</span>" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=1;rounded=1;strokeColor=#495057;strokeWidth=2;html=1;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;fontSize=14;fontColor=#000000;fontStyle=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;labelBorderColor=#ced4da;endArrow=classic;" edge="1" parent="1" source="fe_api" target="be_router"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- DB Connection --> <mxCell id="edge_be_db" value="SQL Queries / BSON Documents<br><span style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: normal;">[TCP / Connection Pool]</span>" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=1;rounded=1;strokeColor=#495057;strokeWidth=2;html=1;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;fontSize=14;fontColor=#000000;fontStyle=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;labelBorderColor=#ced4da;endArrow=classic;" edge="1" parent="1" source="be_orm" target="db_primary"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <!-- Cache Connection --> <mxCell id="edge_be_cache" value="Key-Value Queries" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=1;rounded=1;strokeColor=#495057;strokeWidth=2;html=1;fontFamily=Inter, Helvetica, sans-serif;fontSize=12;fontColor=#000000;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;labelBorderColor=#ced4da;dashed=1;endArrow=classic;" edge="1" parent="1" source="be_services" target="db_cache"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="480" y="420" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram></mxfile>
